atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: To ensure her kidneys are looking good right now and to schedule a kidney ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's twin, Katherine, was born prematurely at 34 and 3 weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine weighed 3 pounds 8 ounces and 3 pounds 13 ounces.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine experienced feeding difficulties, including pauses in breathing during feeding.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine was subsequently put on a cow's milk-free diet.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been diagnosed with Smith-Magenis syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Smith-Magenis syndrome is associated with congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has experienced reflex issues.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has received extensive therapy, including feeding, occupational, and physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has been seen by an allergist, neurologist, and ophthalmologist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's family has seen many specialists.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking ripple pea protein milk and water.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is now crawling and trying to take steps.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a lot of wet diapers, around 8 to 10 per day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine is diagnosed with Smith-Magenis syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine may require further evaluation for congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will obtain the screening of the kidneys by ultrasound today.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: If there are abnormalities on the kidney ultrasound, we will determine next steps and future follow-up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine is a 22-month-old former 34 and 3-week-old, twin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine exhibits mild hypotonia of the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Katherine's eyes appear small.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will call you with the results.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: If it's normal, you won't need to see me again.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: If it's abnormal, you can see me in Kennesaw.

atomic_propositions.speaker: nurse
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The nurse will be in to have you complete some paperwork and give you instructions for the ultrasound.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The family lives in Dallas, Georgia.
